item.title: Loading….
item.description: 460 on left 300 on right 2 years
item.dc:creator: michaelspitler77

item.title: Thanks for the resources. I’m not ready to give up.
item.description: #suicide_prevention Edit: the post with resources is this one: https://imgur.com/gallery/1hCr86F Second Edit: It’s morning where I am now. I slept a bit and woke up to this on the front page. I’m a little embarrassed but also slightly hopeful to see how many good people care about a random internet stranger. Thank you to those that reached out privately too. I have some phone calls to make and resources to try. For those asking, I do have a few diagnoses- ADHD, Generalized Anxiety Disorder and PTSD. I am on meds and do have a therapist. Sometimes bad life things happen and even with those interventions, suicidal thoughts happen. I think we’re changing the tide a little on that in some ways. We as humans used to scream into the void and… nothing. Last night I screamed into the Imgur void… and hundreds of you screamed back. And it helped. Thank you all. This can be such a good, wonderful and life-saving corner of the internet. Thank you to the Imgurian @theblankestblankintown who posted the link to the resources and to whoever on the Imgur staff cared enough to dedicate a site page to this @sarah [US] National Suicide Prevention Lifeline: 1-800-273-8255 [UK] National Suicide Helpline: 0800 689 5652
item.dc:creator: Casztiel

item.title: monsters continue destroying innocent lives.
item.description:
Tonight, russia's multiple rocket launchers destroyed school school No. 6 in Avdiivka. It is the third school destroyed by the enemy in the city. In total Russia destroyed about 200 schools in Donetsk region. russian invaders continue destroying, killing & robbing children's future. Emine Dzheppar Ukraine government official https://twitter.com/EmineDzheppar/status/1539183772109017088 Surviving Russia’s ‘filtration camps’: Russian troops have sent hundreds of thousands of Ukrainians to so-called filtration camps, where Ukrainians have been interrogated and then forced to resettle in remote locations around Russia. Some Ukrainians escaped to Estonia. They told us their stories https://www.nytimes.com/video/world/europe/100000008396333/russia-filtration-camps.html AP evidence points to 600 dead in Mariupol theater airstrike https://apnews.com/article/Russia-ukraine-war-mariupol-theater-c321a196fbd568899841b506afcac7a1
The Sun is rising on the 118th Day of the Russian Invasion on the Capital city of Kyiv. Ukraine continues to Live and Fight on.
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: RIP Merlin
item.description: The growth on his chest got too big and he stopped eating and drinking. I could tell by looking in his eyes that it was his time. He always kicked up a fuss in the vet’s office but this time he purred. I think that was his last gift to me to let me know it was ok. He was my best friend for 14 years and I’ll miss him.
item.dc:creator: OctopusStinkhorn

item.title: Of all my inspirations, this I am most ashamed
item.description:
Bored, lonely, reclusive. I needed something to improve my self esteem. of everything Ecchi protagonists get handed to them, cooking is a skill anyone can learn.
Bahn Mi Pork burgers
Checkerboard Shortbread cookies
Spicy ramen with pickled egg
Grilled ruben sandwich
Pineapple upside down cake
Almond Dragee cookies
Bacon egg croissant sandwiches
Orange vanilla biscotti dipped and drizzled in dark chocolate (these were gluten and dairy free!)
Black forest cherry cake w/cream cheese frosting
Chili cheese stuffed, bacon wrapped, corndogs
Dog tax. Ghost, who is doped up here after getting hit by a car. Made a full recovery, the dolt.
item.dc:creator: zekybomb

50 Previous Meme Trawl Hauls at: https://imgur.com/user/FishMarshall/favorites/folder/3759069/meme-trawl-haul While commonly depicted as humans from the torso up and horses from the neck down, the modern centaur has adapted to a more compact and efficient form using the human head and torso, but forgoing the additional, bulky horse body. Now they look much like your bog standard human, but with a horse's legs for fingers and toes. Having twenty horse legs makes them much more effective predators as well as improving their mobility making them truly fearsome creatures.
item.dc:creator: FishMarshall
